brief_summary: Three-column bar chart for the H2 'How the spec sheet reads against the field'. Force-y-axis (30g-75g). Bordeaux-emphasized MX2A Red column with actuation 45g + bottom-out 75g + housing recipe nylon/nylon/POM. HMX Cloud column at 42g/50g/nylon-nylon. Pro 3.0 Yellow at 50g/67g/PC-nylon. A bordeaux dashed line at 75g marks MX2A's 'heavier register' the article body specifically calls out.
data_sources: cherry-mx2a-revision.mdx § 'How the spec sheet reads' — 'MX2A Red sits at 45g/75g with nylon-on-nylon and a POM stem; the Pro 3.0 Yellow at 50g/67g with PC-top, nylon-bottom, POM stem; HMX Cloud at 42g/50g with nylon-on-nylon and a mixed-material stem. Travel is 4.0mm across the field except for HMX at 3.9mm.'
